metadata.name: Perform a Borescope Inspection of an Engine

description: A technician must use a borescope to inspect the internal components of a jet engine for damage without disassembling it.

nodes.task_description: Insert the borescope probe into the engine's inspection ports.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly navigates the probe into the engine.

nodes.task_description: Visually inspect the compressor and turbine blades for any signs of foreign object damage (FOD), cracks, or distress.

expected_outcome.value: Agent carefully inspects all visible surfaces.

nodes.task_description: Record images or video of any findings and create a report for the engineering team to review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds minor erosion on one blade, captures an image, and generates a report.
